title: Opening for Production Engineer at Parle Products

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Parle Products
jsonLd.description:
Parle Products has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Parle Products:
Parle Products is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
